subject: IBAS Alerts n. 6130 and 6131 are not due to a GRB
body:
D. Gotz (CEA Saclay) and E. Bozzo (ISDC Versoix) on behalf of the IBAS  
Localization Team report:

IBAS Alerts n. 6130 and 6131 are not due to a GRB but to a known  
source (Sco X-1) not filtered correctly.

This messages can be cited.
